summary: Closed draft SysDolphin baselib matching-improvement slice split from PR #2617, later superseded by combined Dolphin support split PR #2632. The diff touched five files under src/sysdolphin/baselib, mainly particle.c string/relocation rewrites and smaller stack, declaration-order, panic-string, and expression-shape changes.

key_files.role: Largest changed file; rewrote multiple OSReport string literals to label-plus-offset references, added lbl_8040A540 byte array, added extern string labels, adjusted exception-report strings, and simplified use of sp->xD4 instead of a local OSContext**.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: particle.c fn_80392CD8, hsd_803931A4, Exception_ReportStackTrace, Exception_ReportCodeline, hsd_80395D88

key_files.role: Reordered local initialization in hsd_803B46D4 so sp8/spC are assigned before jmp_buf/temp_r4.
Changed three OSPanic empty-string arguments to cast HSD_SisLib_804D6390.
Simplified a sentinel comparison from unsigned adjusted arithmetic to direct x8 == -0x10001.

what_changed.text: PR body states this was split from #2617 by directory/subsystem to make matching improvements easier to review, scoped to src/sysdolphin/baselib.
The PR was closed unmerged and superseded by PR #2632, according to the author's issue comment.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: issue_comment Superseded by the combined Dolphin support split PR #2632

what_changed.text: particle.c concentrated many string-literal-to-label-offset substitutions for MCC error reporting, EXI init reporting, stack trace reporting, and exception codeline reporting.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: particle.c lbl_8040A540 byte array and OSReport label offsets
raw_diff: Exception_ReportStackTrace and Exception_ReportCodeline use lbl_8040AB00 offsets

what_changed.text: Small codegen-shaping edits included adding PAD_STACK(4), moving local assignments, removing an intermediate pointer-to-field local, and rewriting a comparison to a direct negative sentinel.

The PR body reports only limited local checks for this slice: isolated path-slice creation from origin/master and git diff --check passed; it explicitly says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting would be authoritative once completed.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting on this draft is authoritative once it completes

smart_moves.text: Splitting a broader matching branch by directory/subsystem was used to reduce review scope.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Split from #2617 by directory/subsystem so the matching improvements are easier to review

smart_moves.text: The PR body distinguished preliminary full-branch score data from the authoritative per-PR CI/decomp-dev report for the draft slice.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting on this draft is the authoritative slice score once it completes

smart_moves.text: The author closed the isolated SysDolphin slice after deciding a combined Dolphin support split would keep related support changes together for review and CI.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: Superseded by the combined Dolphin support split PR #2632

decomp_lessons.lesson: For large matching branches, directory/subsystem slicing can make review easier, but related support changes may need to stay together if splitting fragments review or CI context.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: split by directory/subsystem for easier review
text_corpus.jsonl: superseded by combined Dolphin support split PR #2632

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a draft says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is still pending, treat broad source-branch scores as preliminary rather than proof that each sliced edit matched.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: full source branch report before the split
human_pr_text: Per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting on this draft is the authoritative slice score once it completes

decomp_lessons.lesson: This PR provides evidence of codegen/relocation tactics used in a draft, not evidence that those tactics should be accepted style: string literals were replaced by label offsets and PAD_STACK was added without loaded per-symbol objdiff results.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: particle.c string literals replaced with lbl_8040A540/lbl_8040AB00 offsets
human_pr_text: per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting authoritative once complete

naming_conventions.text: The diff retained address-style names such as fn_80392CD8, lbl_8040A540, lbl_8040A8E0, lbl_8040A904, lbl_8040AB00, and hsd_803931A4 rather than introducing semantic names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: particle.c symbols fn_80392CD8, lbl_8040A540, lbl_8040A8E0, lbl_8040A904, lbl_8040AB00

naming_conventions.text: Temporary register-style locals temp_r4, temp_r4_8, and temp_r4_9 remained in hsd_3B34.c; the PR only reordered assignment statements.
A local named msg was used as a base pointer for string-table offset accesses in particle.c exception reporting.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Added PAD_STACK(4) in HSD_CObjSetUpVector, presumably to shape stack layout, but the slice does not include a narrow objdiff result for this function.
Reordered independent-looking assignments in hsd_803B46D4, placing sp8/spC loads before jmp_buf/temp_r4 assignment.
Replaced many inline string literals with address-style labels and label offsets to influence string relocation behavior.
Replaced an intermediate OSContext** local with direct sp->xD4 field reads in hsd_80395D88.
Rewrote an unsigned arithmetic comparison in synth.c as a direct signed sentinel comparison against -0x10001.
Changed OSPanic message arguments from empty string literals to a cast global HSD_SisLib_804D6390 in sislib.c.

review_feedback.author: fjooord
review_feedback.text: Superseded by the combined Dolphin support split PR #2632, which keeps the support changes together for review and CI.
No review comments or reviews are present in the loaded slice.

follow_up_queries: PR #2632 combined Dolphin support split review outcome
PR #2617 original unsplit matching branch context
src/sysdolphin/baselib particle.c string relocation label offsets

notes: Strong evidence for PR identity, changed files, exact diff edits, and superseding comment.
No review comments or reviews are available.

The PR body includes preliminary score data from the full unsplit source branch, but explicitly says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting would be authoritative once complete; no completed per-PR CI/objdiff output is loaded.
The PR was closed unmerged and superseded, so tactics in the diff should be treated as draft evidence, not accepted project style.

Several edits conflict with or at least stress loaded standards around string-literal symbols, text-before-data matching, and matching tactics needing evidence; those are routed as curator review notes rather than accepted facts.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Subsystem slicing can aid review but may be superseded when support changes need shared CI context
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2631 was created as a src/sysdolphin/baselib slice from #2617 to make matching improvements easier to review, then closed in favor of combined Dolphin support split PR #2632 to keep support changes together for review and CI.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Treat unsplit-branch score reports as preliminary for path-sliced drafts
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR reports full unsplit source-branch matching metrics and local diff-check status, but explicitly defers authority to per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting once complete.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting on this draft is the authoritative slice score once it completes

source_update_candidates.title: Use PR #2631 as cautionary evidence for string-literal-to-label-offset matching tactics
source_update_candidates.text: This superseded draft replaced many ordinary OSReport string literals with address-style labels and label offsets in particle.c. Because no completed per-PR objdiff/CI evidence is loaded and the draft was superseded, curator should consider citing this only as a cautionary example aligned with no-string-literal-symbol-regression/text-before-data-matching, not as an accepted tactic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: particle.c lbl_8040A540 byte array and label-offset OSReport calls
raw_diff: Exception_ReportStackTrace and Exception_ReportCodeline label-offset OSReport calls
human_pr_text: per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting authoritative once complete
source_update_candidates.reason: Loaded standards already discourage string-literal symbol regressions and data churn without evidence; this PR is useful as a concrete historical draft that stressed those rules.

source_update_candidates.title: PAD_STACK in cobj.c needs narrow verifier evidence before acceptance
source_update_candidates.text: The PR added PAD_STACK(4) to HSD_CObjSetUpVector, but the loaded slice provides no narrow objdiff/checkdiff result for that function. Curator may cross-reference this with the existing matching-tactics-need-evidence standard if more examples are desired.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting authoritative once complete
source_update_candidates.reason: The evidence supports that the tactic was used in the draft, but not that it was validated or accepted.

rejection_notes: Do not record the preliminary full-branch matched-code/data percentages as this PR's final validation result; the PR body says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative once complete.
Do not infer reviewer approval or merge acceptance; metadata shows CLOSED with merged_at null and no review comments/reviews.
Do not promote string-label-offset substitutions in particle.c as accepted style; the loaded standards generally prefer inline string literals unless data ownership evidence supports symbolization.
Do not infer semantic meanings for address-style labels such as lbl_8040A540 or lbl_8040AB00 beyond their observed string-table use in this diff.
